message:
fix: use GitHub project icons in blueprint via SVG <image> element (#5366)

Replace letter initials with actual GitHub org avatars using native
SVG <image> element instead of foreignObject (which had cross-origin
issues). Each project node now shows the real Prometheus, Grafana,
Falco, Kyverno, cert-manager logo. Falls back to colored letter
initial if the image fails to load.

Uses circular clipPath for clean round icons inside the node circles.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
